# Hair by Abi

> Independent hair stylist at Bella Bouture Beauty Studio in Hammond, Louisiana. Cuts, color, balayage, color corrections, and bridal styling for the Northshore. Appointment only.

Hair by Abi is a one-chair operation inside Bella Bouture Beauty Studio at 109 W Minnesota Park Rd, Suite 5, Hammond, LA 70403, serving Hammond, Ponchatoula, Amite, and the surrounding Tangipahoa Parish area. Abi does dimensional color, color correction, and balayage built to survive Louisiana humidity, alongside bridal and special-occasion styling. Trained at Aveda, licensed in 2024, behind the chair since 2025.

## Services
- Cut & Style — consultation, cut, wash, and finished blowout
- Color — single-process, root touch-ups, gloss, tonal refresh
- Balayage & Highlights — hand-painted dimension and classic foil work
- Bridal & Special Occasion — trials and on-site styling for the Northshore
- Vivid & Specialty Color — peekaboos, money pieces, hair tinsel, hair feathers, full vivids
- Color Correction — multi-step, consultation required

## Location & Contact
- Bella Bouture Beauty Studio, 109 W Minnesota Park Rd, Suite 5, Hammond, LA 70403
- Phone: (985) 662-6088
- Instagram: @hairbyabi444
- Parking in front of the building
- Appointment only

## Service Area
- Hammond, LA (home base)
- Ponchatoula, LA
- Amite, LA
- Tangipahoa Parish
- Northshore region

## Booking
Appointment only, booked through Square Appointments: https://squareup.com/appointments/book/L08ZP9BVXC6CZ
No cancellation fee. Deposits, where required, are shown and collected at booking.
